document.source_title: RR vs LSG: Predicted playing XI, head-to-head, pitch report, Jaipur weather update
document.summary: Rajasthan Royals (RR) are looking to end a three-match losing streak as they face Lucknow Super Giants (LSG) in Jaipur. With 12 points from 12 matches, RR needs a win to keep their playoff hopes alive. LSG, despite being out of playoff contention, has shown improved form, particularly with Mitchell Marsh's recent performances. The match will be played at Sawai Mansingh Stadium, where high-scoring games have been common this season.
key_takeaways: RR has lost three consecutive matches and needs a win to stay in playoff contention.
LSG has shown improved form, especially with Mitchell Marsh's recent performances.
The match will be played at Sawai Mansingh Stadium, known for high-scoring games.
RR's last three home matches have ended in defeat.
The toss will take place at 7:00 PM IST, with the match starting at 7:30 PM IST.
Weather conditions are expected to be hot and dry with no chance of rain.
document.why_it_matters: This match is crucial for Rajasthan Royals as they aim to secure a playoff spot in IPL 2026. The performance of key players and the match conditions could significantly impact their chances.
